hero.subtitle: Yamba connects senders with travelers all around the world.

speed.title: Lightning delivery
speed.description: Instead of 3-5 days with a classic carrier. Your parcel travels at the speed of a traveler.

ecology.title: Zero additional CO₂
ecology.description: The traveler was going anyway. Yamba doesn't create transport, it optimizes the existing.

savings.title: Up to 73% cheaper
savings.description: You share the cost of an already-paid trip. No margin on dedicated transport.

liveMap.subtitle: Each trip on the map = one parcel traveling without additional CO₂.

mobileStats.globalSubtitle: From Paris to Brazzaville, from Tokyo to New York

journey.label: The Yamba journey
journey.subtitle: Designed to protect you at every step, from payment to delivery.

find.title: Find
find.description: A Yamber going to your destination.

book.title: Book
book.description: Secure payment via Stripe, held until delivery.

receive.title: Receive
receive.description: Confidential code for the authorized person.

timeline.label: Mutual protection
timeline.subtitle: Safety period to report any issue before fund release.

r1.quote: Sent a parcel to Brazzaville for 3 times less. The traveler kept me updated all the way.
r1.name: Aminata L.

r2.quote: Yamber for 6 months on Lyon-Paris. My train tickets are paid. Really top-notch.
r2.name: Thomas F.

r3.quote: Excellent service. The rating system and secure payments reassured me from the start.
r3.name: Marie S.

r4.quote: Got my parcel in less than 24h, hand-delivered by a friendly traveler. Mind-blowing.
r4.name: David K.

r5.quote: The confidential code at delivery is super reassuring. That's what makes the difference.
r5.name: Sarah E.

finalCta.subtitle: Join 12,000+ people who send and transport differently.

shipper.title: Shipper
shipper.description: Send your parcel in 24h for 73% less than a classic carrier.

yamber.title: Yamber
yamber.description: Already traveling? Earn an average of €120/month on your planned trips.
